summary: Testing of chat feature and booking bug fix completed. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (100%). Chat API endpoints fully functional. Frontend: Critical navigation error prevents full UI testing - BookingsScreen crashes with 'NavigationContainer' error when tab is clicked.

integration_issues.issue: React error: 'Couldn't find a navigation object. Is your component inside NavigationContainer?' when clicking Bookings tab. Error occurs in BookingsScreen at useFocusEffect hook (line 37-41 in app/(tabs)/bookings.tsx). This prevents the Bookings screen from loading and blocks testing of chat feature UI.

react_native_issues.issue: useFocusEffect from @react-navigation/native is used but navigation context is not available when tab is clicked. This causes the entire BookingsScreen to crash with red error screen.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix NavigationContainer error in BookingsScreen. The useFocusEffect hook is causing crash when Bookings tab is clicked. Possible solutions: 1) Ensure NavigationContainer wraps the tab navigator properly, 2) Use useEffect with tab focus listener instead of useFocusEffect, 3) Check if @react-navigation/native is properly configured in Expo Router setup
After fixing navigation error, retest: Bookings tab loads → active booking appears → chat button works → chat screen opens → message can be sent
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend chat API fully functional (8/8 tests passed)
✓ GET /api/bookings/{booking_id}/messages - returns messages, master_name, game_title, booking_status
✓ Message validation working (empty messages rejected with 400)
✓ Authorization working (wrong user cannot access other's bookings)
✓ Multiple messages can be sent and retrieved in correct order
✓ GET /api/bookings returns active bookings immediately after booking (bug fix verified at API level)
✗ CRITICAL: Frontend BookingsScreen crashes with NavigationContainer error
✗ Cannot test UI flows due to navigation crash
⚠ useFocusEffect from @react-navigation/native may not be compatible with Expo Router tabs
⚠ Chat screen code looks correct (testIDs present, proper structure) but cannot be tested due to navigation blocker
seed_data_creation: Created test user testui73155 with active booking on 'Тени Вальхаллы' game for testing. Booking ID: 996a6087-64e1-4313-87b8-ce3816a6ede1. Sent 1 test message via API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend chat feature is fully functional. Frontend has critical navigation error in BookingsScreen that must be fixed before UI testing can proceed. Error: 'Couldn't find a navigation object' when using useFocusEffect hook. Test user testui73155/quest123 has active booking ready for testing once navigation is fixed. All previous features (auth, games, wallet, leaderboard, profile) were working in iteration 2.
